assertions.assertion: Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework NuGet package
assertions.rationale: Shows `dotnet add package Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework` and the updated .csproj with the package reference.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddClientConfigurationStore() on the IdentityServer configuration builder
Warns against using in-memory stores for dynamically registered clients in production
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states in bold: 'Do NOT use in-memory stores for dynamically registered clients in production.'

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest implementing IClientConfigurationStore from scratch when the EF package is available
assertions.rationale: Only shows the EF-backed approach. Does not suggest implementing IClientConfigurationStore from scratch.
